children.heading: Death benefits, etc.
children.label: 1 Death benefits, etc.
children.text: All claims and benefits accrued, and all losses incurred (whether or not ascertained), during the taxable year on insurance and annuity contracts.

children.heading: Increases in certain reserves
children.label: 2 Increases in certain reserves
children.text: The net increase in reserves which is required by section 807(b) to be taken into account under this paragraph.

children.heading: Policyholder dividends
children.label: 3 Policyholder dividends
children.text: The deduction for policyholder dividends (determined under section 808(c)).

children.label: i
children.text: for 100 percent dividends received, and

children.label: ii
children.text: for the life insurance company’s share of the dividends (other than 100 percent dividends) received.

children.label: i
children.text: the deduction allowed under section 172,

children.label: ii
children.text: the deductions allowed by sections 243(a)(1) and 245, and

children.label: iii
children.text: any capital loss carryback to the taxable year under section 1212(a)(1),

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as provided in clause (ii), the term “100 percent dividend” means any dividend if the percentage used for purposes of determining the deduction allowable under section 243 or 245(b) is 100 percent.

children.heading: Treatment of dividends from noninsurance companies
children.label: ii Treatment of dividends from noninsurance companies
children.text: The term “100 percent dividend” does not include any distribution by a corporation which is not an insurance company to the extent such distribution is out of tax-exempt interest, or out of the increase for the taxable year in policy cash values (within the meaning of subparagraph (F)) of life insurance policies and annuity and endowment contracts to which section 264(f) applies, or out of dividends which are not 100 percent dividends (determined with the application of this clause as if it applies to distributions by all corporations including insurance companies).

children.heading: Special rules for certain dividends from insurance companies
children.label: D Special rules for certain dividends from insurance companies
I
children.text: the paying company’s share determined under section 812 for such taxable year, exceeds

children.label: II
children.text: the receiving company’s share determined under section 812 for its taxable year in which the dividend is received or accrued,

children.label: I
children.text: the portion of such dividend attributable to prorated amounts, multiplied by

children.label: II
children.text: the percentage obtained by subtracting the share described in subclause (II) of clause (i) from the share described in subclause (I) of such clause.

children.heading: Prorated amounts
children.label: iii Prorated amounts
children.text: For purposes of this subparagraph, the term “prorated amounts” means tax-exempt interest, the increase for the taxable year in policy cash values (within the meaning of subparagraph (F)) of life insurance policies and annuity and endowment contracts to which section 264(f) applies, and dividends other than 100 percent dividends.

children.heading: Portion of dividend attributable to prorated amounts
children.label: iv Portion of dividend attributable to prorated amounts
I
children.text: any dividend by the paying corporation shall be treated as paid first out of earnings and profits for taxable years beginning after , attributable to prorated amounts (to the extent thereof), andDecember 31, 1983

children.label: II
children.text: by determining the portion of earnings and profits so attributable without any reduction for the tax imposed by this chapter.

children.heading: Subparagraph to apply to dividends from other insurance companies
children.label: v Subparagraph to apply to dividends from other insurance companies
children.text: Rules similar to the rules of this subsection shall apply in the case of 100 percent dividends paid by an insurance company which is not a life insurance company.

children.heading: Certain dividends received by foreign corporations
children.label: E Certain dividends received by foreign corporations
children.text: Subparagraph (A)(i) (and not subparagraph (A)(ii)) shall apply to any dividend received by a foreign corporation from a domestic corporation which would be a 100 percent dividend if section 1504(b)(3) did not apply for purposes of applying section 243(b)(2).

children.heading: Increase in policy cash values
children.label: F Increase in policy cash values
I
children.text: gross premiums paid during such taxable year, and

children.label: II
children.text: distributions (other than amounts includible in the policyholder’s gross income) during such taxable year to which section 72(e) applies.

children.label: I
children.text: commissions payable with respect to such policy or contract for the taxable year, and

children.label: II
children.text: asset management fees, surrender charges, mortality and expense charges, and any other fees or charges specified in regulations prescribed by the Secretary which are imposed (or which would be imposed were the policy or contract canceled) with respect to such policy or contract for the taxable year.

children.heading: Assumption by another person of liabilities under insurance, etc., contracts
children.label: 6 Assumption by another person of liabilities under insurance, etc., contracts
children.text: The consideration (other than consideration arising out of indemnity reinsurance) in respect of the assumption by another person of liabilities under insurance and annuity contracts.

children.label: A
children.text: are paid or accrued by another insurance company in respect of policies the taxpayer has reinsured, and

children.label: B
children.text: are reimbursable by the taxpayer under the terms of the reinsurance contract.

children.heading: Other deductions
children.label: 8 Other deductions
children.text: Subject to the modifications provided by subsection (b), all other deductions allowed under this subtitle for purposes of computing taxable income.

children.heading: Interest
children.label: 1 Interest
children.text: In applying section 163 (relating to deduction for interest), no deduction shall be allowed for interest in respect of items described in section 807(c).

children.label: i
children.text: the deduction provided by section 170,

children.label: ii
children.text: the deductions provided by paragraphs (3) and (4) of subsection (a),

children.label: iii
children.text: any net operating loss carryback to the taxable year under section 172, and

children.label: iv
children.text: any capital loss carryback to the taxable year under section 1212(a)(1), and

children.label: B
children.text: under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, a rule similar to the rule contained in section 170(d)(2)(B) (relating to special rule for net operating loss carryovers) shall be applied.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Section 171 shall not apply.

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: B Cross reference
children.text: For rules relating to amortizable bond premium, see section 811(b).

children.heading: Dividends received deduction
children.label: 4 Dividends received deduction
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (a)(4), the deductions for dividends received provided by sections 243 and 245 shall not be allowed.
